news.title: Tuna Prices Surge as Iran Crisis Ripples Through Japan’s Hotels
news.description: Fresh tuna, glistening in vivid red, is served in unlimited portions, but resort hotels in Japan are beginning to feel the strain as escalating tensions involving Iran push up costs across the supply chain. (News On Japan)

clusters.title: Supply Chain Attacks
clusters.summary: The European Commission experienced a cloud infrastructure breach caused by ShinyHunters, resulting in the theft and leakage of approximately 340GB of data.

clusters.title: AMD Switching Components
clusters.summary: AMD is transitioning to off-the-shelf components for its upcoming Steam Deck 2, indicating a shift towards standard hardware.

stocks.ai_explanation: TSM is a semiconductor manufacturer known for its security products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
AMD is a semiconductor manufacturer focusing on CPUs and GPUs. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
ASML is a Dutch multinational corporation specializing in advanced lithography systems. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
INTC is an American multinational conglomerate focused on information technology. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
QCOM is a semiconductor manufacturer primarily producing mobile chips. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
